Class AdoptionRequest

java.lang.Object
shelter.domain.AdoptionRequest
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<AdoptionRequest>
public class AdoptionRequest extends Object implements Comparable<AdoptionRequest>
Represents a request submitted by an adopter to adopt a specific animal. An adoption request starts in RequestStatus.PENDING and transitions to RequestStatus.APPROVED, RequestStatus.REJECTED, or RequestStatus.CANCELLED through the corresponding lifecycle methods.

  • Constructor Details

    • AdoptionRequest

      public AdoptionRequest(String id, Adopter adopter, Animal animal, RequestStatus status, LocalDateTime submittedAt)
      Reconstruction constructor for deserializing an AdoptionRequest from persistent storage. This constructor accepts an explicit id, pre-existing status, and submission timestamp so that the full request state can be restored from CSV data without modification.
      Parameters:
      id - the pre-existing unique identifier; must not be null or blank
      adopter - the adopter who submitted the request; must not be null
      animal - the animal the adopter wishes to adopt; must not be null
      status - the current status of the request; must not be null
      submittedAt - the original timestamp when the request was submitted; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter is null or id is blank

    • AdoptionRequest

      public AdoptionRequest(Adopter adopter, Animal animal)
      Constructs a new AdoptionRequest in RequestStatus.PENDING status. Both adopter and animal are required and must not be null.
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter submitting the request; must not be null
      animal - the animal the adopter wishes to adopt; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if adopter or animal is null

    • AdoptionRequest

      public AdoptionRequest(AdoptionRequest other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new AdoptionRequest with all field values copied from other. The copy preserves the same ID, adopter, animal, status, and submission timestamp.
      Parameters:
      other - the AdoptionRequest instance to copy; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • approve

      public void approve()
      Approves this adoption request, transitioning its status to RequestStatus.APPROVED. This method may only be called while the request is in RequestStatus.PENDING status.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the request is not currently RequestStatus.PENDING

    • reject

      public void reject()
      Rejects this adoption request, transitioning its status to RequestStatus.REJECTED. This method may only be called while the request is in RequestStatus.PENDING status.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the request is not currently RequestStatus.PENDING

    • cancel

      public void cancel()
      Cancels this adoption request, transitioning its status to RequestStatus.CANCELLED. This method may only be called while the request is in RequestStatus.PENDING status.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the request is not currently RequestStatus.PENDING

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this adoption request.
      Returns:
      the UUID string identifying this request

    • getAdopter

      public Adopter getAdopter()
      Returns the adopter who submitted this request.
      Returns:
      the Adopter associated with this request

    • getAnimal

      public Animal getAnimal()
      Returns the animal this request targets.
      Returns:
      the Animal associated with this request

    • getStatus

      public RequestStatus getStatus()
      Returns the current status of this adoption request.
      Returns:
      the RequestStatus of this request

    • getSubmittedAt

      public LocalDateTime getSubmittedAt()
      Returns the timestamp at which this request was created.
      Returns:
      the submission LocalDateTime

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(AdoptionRequest other)
      Compares this request to another by submission timestamp ascending. Earlier requests are ordered first, reflecting the natural queue order.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<AdoptionRequest>
      Parameters:
      other - the other AdoptionRequest to compare to
      Returns:
      a negative number if this request was submitted earlier, positive if later, zero if equal

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Returns true if the given object is an AdoptionRequest with the same ID.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the object to compare
      Returns:
      true if o is an AdoptionRequest with the same ID

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code based on this request's unique ID. Consistent with equals(Object).
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this request including ID, adopter, animal, and status.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a human-readable description of this request
